title: Ube's Delight
description: A Farmer’s Delight addon that adds Filipino inspired crops and food.
body:
![Ube's Delight Banner](https://i.imgur.com/7dSLMOl.png) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1159501560997498952?color=a46083&label=Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=a46083&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/mbuDBHHUws) Ube’s Delight is an addon mod for Farmer's Delight ([Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) | [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric) | [Fabric Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) that adds Filipino-inspired crops and food. Venture into the uncharted wilderness and seek out the elusive Jungle Biome, where a treasure trove of new crops awaits your discovery. Experience the rich and vibrant flavors of authentic Filipino cuisine like never before! Step into a culinary paradise where Lumpia sizzles in golden perfection, Arroz Caldo warms your virtual soul, and Halo Halo takes you on a tantalizingly sweet journey.
![lumpia](https://i.imgur.com/On5HcO6.png) ![arroz_caldo](https://i.imgur.com/H30cAy0.png) ![halo_halo](https://i.imgur.com/5VV05F5.png)
Unlock an abundance of traditional Filipino recipes, enabling you to recreate the essence of Filipino cuisine right within the Minecraft universe!
![ube_cake](https://i.imgur.com/LMJSoLt.png) ![ube_cake_slice](https://i.imgur.com/peNGIbr.png) ![ensaymada](https://i.imgur.com/6Wl5Mep.png) ![ube_ensaymada](https://i.imgur.com/THvM8N0.png)
Check out V0.3.0 New Leaf Feasts(Kamayan) and Rolling Pins! ### Features Crops: Ube, Garlic, Ginger, Lemongrass
Ingredients: Condensed Milk, Fish Sauce, Milk Powder, Brown Sugar
Drinks: Ube Milk Tea and Halo Halo
Sweets: Ube Cake, Leche Flan, Ube Cookie, Ginger Cookie, 4 Flavours of Polvorone to discover!
Feasts: Leche Flan, Halo Halo, Ube Milk Tea, 10 Leaf Feasts
Heat Source: Kalan
Food: 12 new dishes to discover!
Rolling Pin: Wood, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite Rolling Pins
Baking Mat: 27 Recipes
Mod Integrations: Eating Animation, Mod Menu, Fabric Seasons, Serene Seasons, Botany Pots, Create, Dehydration, Supplementaries, Origins, Presence Footsteps, WTHIT/WAILA, REI, JEI, EMI, Better Combat ### Planned Features
  • More Food, Drinks, and Feasts!
  • More ingredients and fun ways to craft them
### Development As this mod is still in development, it's possible to encounter issues and instabilities. When updating to the latest version:
  • Back-up your saves
  • Ensure no conflicts before updating Modpacks
  • Report issues here. Appreciate your time!
### Links [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)
[[Deprecated]Farmer's Delight Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)
